scripts.move:install-cli: which iota > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Installing IOTA CLI via Homebrew...' && brew install iotaledger/tap/iota)
scripts.move:fetch-framework: test -d .tmp/iota-framework/crates/iota-framework/packages/iota-framework/sources || (echo 'Downloading IOTA Move framework...' && mkdir -p .tmp && cd .tmp && rm -rf iota-framework && git clone --depth 1 --branch mainnet --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/iotaledger/iota.git iota-framework && cd iota-framework && git sparse-checkout set crates/iota-framework/packages/iota-framework crates/iota-framework/packages/move-stdlib && echo 'Framework downloaded.')
scripts.move:build: npm run move:install-cli && npm run move:fetch-framework && cd move/forum && iota move build
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && cd desktop && npm install && npx electron-builder --publish never
scripts.desktop:build:win: npm run build && cd desktop && npm install && npx electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run build && cd desktop && npm install && npx electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.desktop:build:linux: npm run build && cd desktop && npm install && npx electron-builder --linux --publish never
